title: Leaf's Weapons&Tools
body:
**Leaf's Weapons&Tools** is a 3d texture-pack, that changing common 2d swords to their **3d versions**! In future we're going to remake also other items) 
This texture-pack is suitable for all versions!
Made by Leaf Studio! 
Our [discord](https://discord.gg/6m7nVsGJMP)
## swords list
![swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a03f075301b5f60443d9c4e0e9085b5eff08782e.png)
# does not require optifine or cit resewn!
**and that's cool)**
